title: athyrium lastii
intro: Athyrium lastii, also known as the Lady fern, is a species of flowering plant in the fern family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in wound healing and reducing pain. The Lady fern is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, and improving respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Athyrium lastii include infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
